Title: Upload Valid Profile Photo in JPG Format
Objective: Verify functionality for uploading a profile photo in JPG format successfully and updating student details.
Preconditions:
User is logged in as Staff.
Currently on Student Detail page of a student without profile photo (displaying default avatar).
ExpectedResult:
Photo uploaded successfully.
Success notification appears and default avatar is replaced by uploaded JPG photo.

Title: Upload Valid Profile Photo in PNG Format
Objective: Verify functionality for uploading a profile photo in PNG format successfully and updating student details.
Preconditions:
User is logged in as Staff.
Currently on Student Detail page of a student without profile photo.
ExpectedResult:
Photo uploaded successfully.
Default avatar is replaced by uploaded PNG photo.

Title: Replace Current Profile Photo
Objective: Verify system overwrites existing photo when uploading a new photo for a student.
Preconditions:
User is logged in as Staff.
Student currently has an existing profile photo.
ExpectedResult: New photo overwrites old photo successfully on UI and in storage.

Title: Delete Current Profile Photo (Soft Delete)
Objective: Verify functionality for deleting current photo and reverting student profile to default avatar.
Preconditions:
User is logged in as Staff.
Student has an existing profile photo.
Steps:
1. Click Delete Photo button;
2. Confirm deletion in dialog modal.
ExpectedResult: Photo reference is cleared and student avatar reverts to default placeholder avatar.

Title: Display Default Avatar When Student Has No Profile Photo
Objective: Verify system renders default fallback avatar for students without profile photos.
Preconditions:
User is logged in as Staff or Student.
Student profile has no photo URL.
Steps:
1. Open Student Detail page;
2. Observe avatar image element.
ExpectedResult: Default SVG/PNG placeholder avatar is rendered cleanly without broken image icon.

Title: Verify Profile Photo Rendering Sizes Across Different UI Components
Objective: Verify profile photos render with correct circular crop and appropriate dimensions across student list, detail view, and header.
Preconditions:
User is logged in as Staff.
Student has uploaded profile photo.
ExpectedResult: Photo scales properly with object-fit: cover, maintains aspect ratio, and clips cleanly to circle without distorting.

Title: Click Save Photo Without Selecting Image File
Objective: Verify system blocks submission when Save is clicked without picking an image file.
Preconditions:
User is logged in as Staff.
Upload modal open.
Steps:
1. Open Upload Photo modal;
2. Click Save Photo button without selecting any file.
ExpectedResult:
System blocks action.
Validation error appears: "Please select an image file to upload."

Title: Upload Non-image Format File
Objective: Verify system rejects non-image files (PDF, DOCX, TXT, EXE).
Preconditions: User is logged in as Staff.
ExpectedResult:
System blocks upload.
Validation error appears: "Invalid file format. Only JPG and PNG image files are allowed."

Title: Verify File Naming Structure on Google Drive Storage
Objective: Verify system renames uploaded photo files matching student ID format on Google Drive.
Preconditions:
User is logged in as Staff.
Student ID is "ST001".
Steps:
1. Upload photo "my_avatar_2026.jpg" for student ST001;
2. Inspect saved file name in Google Drive directory.
ExpectedResult: File is saved to Google Drive with standardized filename format "ST001.jpg".

Title: Upload Photo for Student with Special Characters in Original Filename
Objective: Verify uploading files with non-ASCII or special characters in filename renames safely during storage.
Preconditions:
User is logged in as Staff.
Student ID is "ST002".
Steps:
1. Select file with Unicode filename "avatar_special_char_2026.png";
2. Click Save Photo button.
ExpectedResult: File uploads cleanly and renames to "ST002.png" without encoding errors.

Title: Verify File Permissions on Google Drive Storage
Objective: Verify uploaded photo files on Google Drive are configured with public read permission for rendering.
Preconditions: Photo uploaded to Google Drive.
Steps:
1. Upload photo for student;
2. Verify direct view URL accessibility.
ExpectedResult: Image URL resolves and renders image in web browser without authentication wall.

Title: Upload Oversized Image File Exceeding Maximum Limit
Objective: Verify system blocks uploading files exceeding file size limit (e.g., > 5MB).
Preconditions: User is logged in as Staff.
Steps:
1. Select oversized file "large_photo.jpg" (12MB);
2. Click Save Photo button.
ExpectedResult:
System blocks upload.
Validation error appears: "File size exceeds maximum limit of 5MB."

Title: Upload Image File with Uppercase Extension (.JPG / .PNG)
Objective: Verify system handles uppercase file extensions (.JPG, .PNG) correctly.
Preconditions: User is logged in as Staff.
Steps:
1. Select file "PHOTO.JPG";
2. Click Save Photo button.
ExpectedResult: System accepts upload successfully regardless of extension case.

Title: Upload Fails Due to Google Drive Connection Error
Objective: Verify graceful error handling when Google Drive API connection fails.
Preconditions:
User is logged in as Staff.
Google Drive service is disconnected or unreachable.
Steps: 1. Attempt to upload profile photo when Drive API is offline.
ExpectedResult:
System catches exception.
Error message displays: "Unable to connect to storage service. Please try again later."

Title: Upload Fails Due to Unconfigured Google Drive Target Folder
Objective: Verify error notification when Drive folder ID is missing or invalid in system settings.
Preconditions:
User is logged in as Staff.
Target folder ID in config is invalid.
Steps: 1. Attempt to upload profile photo.
ExpectedResult: System blocks upload and logs configuration error message for administrator.

Title: Display Default Avatar When Photo URL Returns HTTP 404 Error
Objective: Verify system gracefully falls back to default avatar if image URL fails to load (404 error).
Preconditions:
User is logged in.
Student photo URL in database points to non-existent image resource.
Steps:
1. Open Student Detail page;
2. Observe image element on error event.
ExpectedResult: Image onError handler triggers and smoothly replaces broken image link with default placeholder avatar.

Title: Verify Student Role Cannot Upload or Delete Profile Photo
Objective: Verify Student role has read-only photo permissions and cannot upload or delete photos.
Preconditions: User is logged in as Student.
Steps:
1. Navigate to Student Detail / Profile page as Student;
2. Inspect photo options.
ExpectedResult: Upload Photo and Delete Photo buttons are absent from UI.

Title: Block Direct API Calls for Photo Upload from Student Account
Objective: Verify backend API blocks photo upload requests submitted with Student JWT authorization token.
Preconditions: Student authorization token.
Steps: 1. Submit direct HTTP POST upload request using Student auth token.
ExpectedResult: Backend rejects request with HTTP 403 Forbidden status.

Title: Deny Access to External Organization Accounts
Objective: Verify users from external email domains cannot access profile photo API or management UI.
Preconditions: External domain account.
Steps: 1. Attempt access with external account.
ExpectedResult: System denies access with HTTP 403 Forbidden.

Title: Verify Image Editing and Cropping Features Are Not Present
Objective: Verify profile photo management upload directly stores selected file without client-side image cropping tools.
Preconditions:
User is logged in as Staff.
Uploading photo.
Steps:
1. Select image file in upload modal;
2. Observe upload workflow.
ExpectedResult: File uploads directly without displaying cropping modal, maintaining simple out-of-scope workflow.
Notes: Related Requirement: M08-F08, Out of Scope (Section 12)
